title: Mandram Vantha Thendralukku Lyrics Mouna Ragam
stanzas:
mandram vantha thendralukku
manjam vara nenjam illaiyo
anbe en anbe

thotta udan suttathenna
katta azhagu vatta nilavo
kanne en kanne

mandram vantha thendralukku
manjam vara nenjam illaiyo
anbe en anbe

sonthagale illamal
bantha paasam kollamal
poove un vaazhkai
thaan enna soll

mandram vantha thendralukku
manjam vara nenjam illaiyo
anbe en anbe

medaiyai pole vaazhkai alla
naadagam aanathum
vizhagi sella
odaiyai pole uravum alla
paadhaigal maariye
payanam sella
pennodu thaan oolavum
velli vanna nilaavum
ennodu nee vanthal enna vaa

mandram vantha thendralukku
manjam vara nenjam illaiyo
anbe en anbe

thotta udan suttathenna
katta azhagu vatta nilavo
kanne en kanne

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the classic film Mouna Ragam.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on August 15, 1986.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mandram Vantha Thendralukku, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for love, beautifully encapsulated through its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal moments in the film Mouna Ragam, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and romance, making it a cherished classic among fans. The collaboration of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and Ilaiyaraaja brings a timeless quality to this enchanting piece.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mandram Vantha Thendralukku is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song from the classic film Mouna Ragam resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of love and longing through its poetic lyrics and soothing melody.
stanzaMeanings: Is there no heart to welcome the gentle breeze that has come? My dear, my dear.
What beauty does the moon possess when it shines brightly? Oh my eyes, my eyes.
Is there a sky that does not gather flowers? Tell me.
Is there no heart to welcome the gentle breeze that has come? My dear, my dear.
Like the dew on the lotus, how does the leader and the follower live?
What is needed for friends to live together, like garlands and music?
Without our own, what is love? Tell me, flower, what is your life?
Is there no heart to welcome the gentle breeze that has come? My dear, my dear.
Life is not like a stage; it is not a drama. Relationships are not like flowing rivers. Paths change, and with a woman, the silver moon comes to me. What does it mean if you come?
Is there no heart to welcome the gentle breeze that has come? My dear, my dear.
What beauty does the moon possess when it shines brightly? Oh my eyes, my eyes.
Is there a sky that does not gather flowers? Tell me.
Is there no heart to welcome the gentle breeze that has come? My dear, my dear.
